title: althaea pontica
intro: Althaea pontica is a perennial plant species in the mallow family, native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its large, pink or white flowers and edible leaves and roots. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. Althaea pontica is known to have several health benefits, including soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation and pain, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in topical creams and ointments to promote wound healing and skin health.
